steps.expected: Streamlit app loads with sidebar controls
steps.observed: Streamlit app loaded with Backtest Configuration sidebar showing strategy dropdown, date range, initial capital, and Run Backtest button
Backtest completed with 4 trades executed, results displayed immediately

steps.action: Check for error banners in UI
steps.expected: No red error banners or exception messages
steps.observed: No error banners visible. Success message displayed: 'Backtest complete! 4 trades executed.'

evidence.network: Page loaded successfully, no failed requests

assertions.title: Backtest runs and shows progress

steps.observed: Backtest executed with st.spinner showing 'Loading stock universe...' and 'Initializing backtest engine...', st.progress bar polling engine.progress at 100ms intervals, then st.success message. Info message 'Loaded 422 stocks from market.db' and success message 'Backtest complete! 4 trades executed.' confirmed the progress flow.

Backtest completed in under 1 second (422 stocks processed near-instantly). Progress bar code confirmed in streamlit_app.py lines 134-157: st.progress() polls engine.progress with percentage text, completes at 100%, then clears after 0.5s. Screenshot captured shows post-completion state with status messages.

evidence.codeEvidence: streamlit_app.py:135 — progress_bar = st.progress(0.0, text='Running backtest...'); line 151 polls engine.progress with percentage display; line 155 shows completion; line 157 clears the bar

assertions.issues: The progress bar flashes too quickly to capture in a screenshot because the backtest for 422 stocks completes in under 1 second. The spinner messages ('Loading stock universe...', 'Initializing backtest engine...') and the progress bar code are confirmed functional. The captured screenshot shows the post-completion state with info and success messages proving the progress flow executed.

assertions.title: NAV chart displays with strategy equity curve

steps.action: Run backtest and scroll to NAV chart section
steps.expected: NAV chart displayed with strategy equity curve
steps.observed: NAV chart titled 'Net Asset Value — Strategy vs Benchmarks' displayed with Chan Theory line (blue solid) showing equity curve from Dec 2025 to Mar 2026, Y-axis showing Net Asset Value in ¥, X-axis showing Date

evidence.pageText: Chart legend includes 'Chan Theory' as the strategy equity curve line

assertions.title: Trade list table shows individual trades

steps.action: Scroll to Trade List section after backtest
steps.expected: Table showing individual trades with trade details
steps.observed: Trade List table displayed with 4 trade rows. Columns: Stock, Entry Date, Exit Date, Entry Price, Exit Price, P&L, P&L%, Hold Days. Trades: 300373 (2026-02-05 to 2026-03-24, P&L -18.37%), 000738 (2026-02-06 to 2026-03-24, P&L -19.38%), 600519 (2026-02-24 to 2026-03-24, P&L -4.21%), 600549 (2026-02-24 to 2026-03-24, P&L -6.94%)

assertions.title: Performance metrics displayed

steps.action: Check Performance Summary section after backtest
steps.expected: Sharpe ratio, Sortino ratio, Max Drawdown, and Win Rate displayed
steps.observed: Performance Summary shows 6 metric cards: Total Return (-13.10%), CAGR (-45.76%), Sharpe Ratio (-2.940), Max Drawdown (-19.00%), Win Rate (0.0%), Trade Count (4). Sortino ratio is NOT displayed — CAGR is shown instead.

evidence.pageText: Metrics displayed: Total Return, CAGR, Sharpe Ratio, Max Drawdown, Win Rate, Trade Count. Sortino ratio is absent.

assertions.issues: Sortino ratio is not displayed in the Performance Summary section. The validation contract requires Sharpe ratio, Sortino ratio, Max Drawdown, and Win Rate. The UI shows CAGR instead of Sortino ratio. Sharpe (pass), Max Drawdown (pass), Win Rate (pass), Sortino (missing).

assertions.title: CSI 300 benchmark line on NAV chart

steps.action: Check NAV chart for CSI 300 benchmark line
steps.expected: CSI 300 benchmark line overlaid alongside strategy equity curve
steps.observed: NAV chart shows 'CSI 300 (沪深300)' as an orange dashed line in the chart legend and visible on the chart alongside the Chan Theory strategy line

evidence.pageText: Chart legend: 'Chan Theory', 'CSI 300 (沪深300)', 'ChiNext (创业板指)'

assertions.title: ChiNext benchmark line on NAV chart

steps.action: Check NAV chart for ChiNext benchmark line
steps.expected: ChiNext benchmark line overlaid alongside strategy equity curve
steps.observed: NAV chart shows 'ChiNext (创业板指)' as a green dotted line in the chart legend and visible on the chart alongside the Chan Theory strategy line and CSI 300 benchmark

evidence.pageText: Chart legend: 'Chan Theory', 'CSI 300 (沪深300)', 'ChiNext (创业板指)'

assertions.title: End-to-end backtest flow

steps.observed: App loaded with sidebar showing Backtest Configuration, chan_theory selected, date range defaults, initial capital ¥1,000,000
Backtest completed with progress flow (spinner + progress bar + success message), 4 trades executed

steps.action: Check NAV chart with benchmark overlays
steps.expected: NAV chart with Chan Theory, CSI 300, ChiNext lines
steps.observed: PASS — NAV chart shows all three lines: Chan Theory (blue solid), CSI 300 (orange dashed), ChiNext (green dotted)

steps.action: Check performance metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, Max Drawdown, Win Rate)
steps.observed: PARTIAL FAIL — Sharpe Ratio (-2.940), Max Drawdown (-19.00%), Win Rate (0.0%) displayed. Sortino ratio is NOT displayed (CAGR shown instead).
PASS — Trade List table with 4 trades showing Stock, Entry Date, Exit Date, Entry Price, Exit Price, P&L, P&L%, Hold Days
PASS — No error banners, no console errors

evidence.network: All page loads successful, no failed requests

assertions.issues: End-to-end flow partially fails because Sortino ratio is not displayed in the Performance Summary. The validation contract requires Sharpe, Sortino, Max Drawdown, and Win Rate to all be visible. Sortino is replaced by CAGR in the metric cards.

frictions.description: Streamlit app uses internal scroll container ([data-testid='stMain']) with overflow-y:auto. Regular page scrolling (agent-browser scroll down) does not work — must use --selector flag targeting the stMain container to scroll the content area.
frictions.resolution: Used 'agent-browser scroll down N --selector [data-testid=stMain]' to scroll within the Streamlit internal container

frictions.description: Backtest completes in under 1 second for 422 stocks, making the progress bar (st.progress) impossible to capture in a screenshot. The progress bar polls at 100ms intervals but is cleared 0.5s after completion.
frictions.resolution: Accepted post-completion screenshot with status messages as evidence. Verified progress bar code exists and is functional in streamlit_app.py.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 6 passed, 2 failed. VAL-UI-007 fails because Sortino ratio is not displayed in the Performance Summary (CAGR shown instead). VAL-CROSS-001 fails because the end-to-end flow requires Sortino ratio to be visible as one of the performance metrics. All other aspects of the backtest flow work correctly: NAV chart with all 3 lines (strategy + CSI 300 + ChiNext), trade list table with 4 trades and full details, no errors, and progress mechanism confirmed functional.
